highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 application forms can be submitted till Mar 28, 2026 (with a late fee of INR 1000) for Malineni Group of Colleges admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the cutoff mark for Malineni Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: The cutoff marks of each admission test and respective programs offered in Malineni Group of Colleges are different. For Andhra Pradesh EAMCET the cutoff ranks for B.Tech is falling between 22000-50000. Cutoff ranks are expected to be 22K-35K for CSE students, 25K-40K for ECE students, 28K-45K for EEE students and 30K-50K for Mechanical students. Even for Post graduation it also takes GATE / pgecet score for the admissions. In these exams, the top ranks guarantee admission. Cutoffs may change annually. Further information regarding admission can be obtained directly at college. Total admissions capacity is 540 with Six Specialization faculties.

faqs.question: Why is Malineni Group of Colleges so famous?
faqs.answer: Malineni Group of Colleges is an authorized college, which is famous for its standard education and infrastructure. It was founded in 1999 and has 5 colleges providing more than 20 courses. Key highlights: Our accomplishment includes a 90% placement record, a community of more than 5000 alumni, 250 loyal and dedicated faculty members encompassing 80% holders of a PhD. Achievements: 228 students get placed in top MNCs- (2021), 15+ research project, 50+ industry collaborations. Accolades: NBA accreditation; NAAC ‘A’ grade ; ISO 9001: 2015 certification. Campus spread: 105 acres, round the clock internet facility, well-equipped facility.

faqs.question: What is the AP EAMCET cutoff for Malineni Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: The AP EAMCET cutoff of Malineni Group of Colleges varies from year to year; in fact, it depends upon a number of factors like the number of applicants, how tough the exam is, and the number of seats. Generally, the cutoff marks for B.E./B. Tech programs could range from 25 marks out of 160. Cutoffs vary with respect to the branch of engineering concerned, that is, some branches, like Computer Science and Electronics, will have a pretty high cutoff as compared with others. You may check the college websites or AP EAMCET portal for the most accurate and updated cutoff information after the results are released.

faqs.question: Is Malineni Group of Colleges good?
faqs.answer: Malineni Group of Colleges is among the most prominent groups of colleges in Andhra Pradesh, offering undergraduate and postgraduate courses in engineering, pharmacy, and management fields. The following colleges are known well for their experienced faculty and modern infrastructure, with standards of high academic caliber. Extracurricular activities, placements, and industry interactions make learning much more effective for students. The placement cell actively interfaces its students with job opportunities in reputed companies. Though, all the individuals may not have the same experience, the overall reputation of Malineni Group of Colleges makes it a preferable choice for many aspiring students.

placements.overview:
Malineni Group of Colleges was founded in 1999. It is a private institute and is located in Prakasam, Andhra Pradesh. Malineni Group of Colleges courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. The institute is approved by AICTE, PCI and NCTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Malineni Group of Colleges offers a total of 19 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Teaching & Education. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and B.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 880. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 22,000 to 1,60,000. Apart from this, the Malineni Group of Colleges campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Malineni Group of Colleges offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and B.Ed. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Malineni Group of Colleges offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Malineni Group of Colleges courses range between INR 22,000 to 1,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: One college with lots of memories.

review_content.Placements: 90% students were placed in IT sector with good packages. Knowledge about coding is sufficiently provided. 3.7 to 9 LPA are the packages offered in this course. Top recruiters are Infosys, Wipro and TCS. 80% students got internship in Tech Mahindra.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and there is a good environment in the hostel. A mess is present. There is a good library. Lab equipments are the best. Wi-Fi is present in the hostel. Games are sports are available.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are friendly and they share a lot of information with us. Semester exams are medium in difficulty. 95% is the pass percentage. Real time projects are also carried out.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the irresponsibility of faculty.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placements, and they don't even teach us proper communication skills. No one is there to clear our doubts in the college. We did our final-year projects online, and we don't have practical knowledge even.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is good, but there is no Wi-Fi. The hostel food is good, but there is no proper water facility. Even sometimes, we didn't have water at midnight, and we went for a strike. In our 2nd year, we didn't have proper water facilities. We suffered a lot in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is not much good, and there are no placements in college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good. The students got the best percentage in academics. In ECE, 90% of students got placed. Overall, it's not bad. But recruiting companies do not come to the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library is good. It has many books, and we can take books for 1 week to study, and after that, we have to return books in the library. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. The classrooms are not much good. The canteen is as usual.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are good. Their teaching is helpful only for exams, not to get placed in companies. The curriculum does not make students industry-ready. Semester exams are not difficult, and we can easily pass out with a minimum percentage of 60%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied, but things can be made much better.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 69% of the students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs.1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 2,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 50,000-to 75,000 per month. Amazon, Idealab and Wipro are the top recruiters. Technical assistant and consultant are the top roles offered in our course. The highest salary package of 25 LPA and the lowest salary package of 1.5 LPA and the average salary package of 1 to 5 LPA are offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are average, but the library is excellent. Classrooms are really pleasant and have a good atmosphere. The food, hostel, medical facilities, sports and games and all other facilities are good. The canteen provides a wide variety of food items.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This is the one of best colleges for B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Many companies visited the campus until now. Placement opportunities are provided by many MNCs such as Wipro, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Capgemini etc. The college trains the students to help them to get placed. They help the students to practice and get good skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Updated computers and lab equipment are available here. Benches are very good and neat. The blackboard is clean. Sports and games are conducted like cricket and kho-kho. Many students are also offered good prizes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members and students.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good, and our placement faculty gives very good support and tips to face the campus interviews. Students get a lot of jobs here. The company named Tech Mahindra also offer jobs to students of this college. Many students get placed from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good labs, and all the labs are well-maintained. Our labs have many computers of new versions, and all those computers are maintained well. Good rules are followed on the campus. Our hostel is very good, and even the mess available here offers very good food.

content.Placements: The placements are good. The students got the best percentage in academics. In ECE, 90% of students got placed. Overall, it's not bad. But recruiting companies do not come to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library is good. It has many books, and we can take books for 1 week to study, and after that, we have to return books in the library. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. The classrooms are not much good. The canteen is as usual.
content.Faculty: The faculty members are good. Their teaching is helpful only for exams, not to get placed in companies. The curriculum does not make students industry-ready. Semester exams are not difficult, and we can easily pass out with a minimum percentage of 60%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied, but things can be made much better.

content.Placements: Mostly 69% of the students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs.1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 2,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 50,000-to 75,000 per month. Amazon, Idealab and Wipro are the top recruiters. Technical assistant and consultant are the top roles offered in our course. The highest salary package of 25 LPA and the lowest salary package of 1.5 LPA and the average salary package of 1 to 5 LPA are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are average, but the library is excellent. Classrooms are really pleasant and have a good atmosphere. The food, hostel, medical facilities, sports and games and all other facilities are good. The canteen provides a wide variety of food items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the one of best colleges for B.Tech.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Many companies visited the campus until now. Placement opportunities are provided by many MNCs such as Wipro, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Capgemini etc. The college trains the students to help them to get placed. They help the students to practice and get good skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Updated computers and lab equipment are available here. Benches are very good and neat. The blackboard is clean. Sports and games are conducted like cricket and kho-kho. Many students are also offered good prizes.

hostel_campus.college_name: Malineni Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: One college with lots of memories.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and there is a good environment in the hostel. A mess is present. There is a good library. Lab equipments are the best. Wi-Fi is present in the hostel. Games are sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the irresponsibility of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, but there is no Wi-Fi. The hostel food is good, but there is no proper water facility. Even sometimes, we didn't have water at midnight, and we went for a strike. In our 2nd year, we didn't have proper water facilities. We suffered a lot in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is not much good, and there are no placements in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The library is good. It has many books, and we can take books for 1 week to study, and after that, we have to return books in the library. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. The classrooms are not much good. The canteen is as usual.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, but things can be made much better.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average, but the library is excellent. Classrooms are really pleasant and have a good atmosphere. The food, hostel, medical facilities, sports and games and all other facilities are good. The canteen provides a wide variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: This is the one of best colleges for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Updated computers and lab equipment are available here. Benches are very good and neat. The blackboard is clean. Sports and games are conducted like cricket and kho-kho. Many students are also offered good prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good labs, and all the labs are well-maintained. Our labs have many computers of new versions, and all those computers are maintained well. Good rules are followed on the campus. Our hostel is very good, and even the mess available here offers very good food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The college is spread over 70 acres. There are good laboratories for all the branches, and they are well-equipped. The college provides good food to all the students who live in the hostel. We also have a big playground for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were not good in 2018 as they invited only BPO companies.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide WI-FI facility. Labs were not at all good, and they did not have enough equipment and software. Classrooms were okay. The college doesn't provide medical facilities. We couldn't play sports well as there were no good playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and faculty are good, and they are providing good facilities.
reviews.review_text: I'm proud to say that I studied in this college, and I stayed in the hostel. Here, education and practical labs were good. The quality of classrooms was very good. The college has appointed one doctor and nurse to prevent the medical issues of students. My hostel was very clean and good. All the friends, wardens, and seniors were very close to us. Canteen food was awesome, and the quality of food was too good. Staff in the canteen were good. At present, I am staying in Hyderabad, and until now, ...

reviews.review_heading: College is excellent for the students who study independently.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure when we compared other to the all of colleges in our district. This is an excellent college for infrastructure. For every department, we have separate blocks. The college provides good lab facility, even for mechanical and civil departments also labs are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: College is good with excellent faculty and Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is Excellent. An good campus in our district. For every department there is a separate block and the labs are very good. An good greenery is there in our college. For every department there is separate HOD'S and they are in the same blocks where the department is.

reviews.review_heading: Good and I suggest the students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The fresh and natural environment is available. The library was satisfactory even though with small volumes of books. The classrooms are convenient and each department has their own department HOD rooms. Special importance was given to sports and others.

reviews.review_heading: The college satisfies the students who know their living conditions and strive for good results.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by this college are quite simple and suitable for students from middle-class homes. There is a nice environment surrounded by eco-friendly climate. The infrastructure of the labs is okay with utmost sufficient things. If there are interested students, the college provides all the benefits for sports people also.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college faculty. Good placement record, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided on the campus. Classrooms are good. The college environment is good. The library is good, and it can accommodate 60 members to study at a time. Medical facilities are good. In case of an emergency, the floor in charge will take care of the students. There is a sports ground in our college to play ccricket and kabbadi.

reviews.review_heading: Better for a student who can be in top 30 in his college.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the entire campus. A Library with a large number of books is available. We have two tennis courts, one basketball court, a volleyball court and a cricket ground. Special PCs for ECE students for circuit designing are present. A computer centre for CSE and drawing hall are available.
